description: Use this API to set the definition of a bus subsystem. This can be used to toggle a particular bus subsystem on or off. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = bsysdef(sid, defined)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid bus subsystem id. valid bus subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: defined
parameters.description: Flag used to mark the bus subsystem as undefined/defined. (input).

defined.description: mark the bus subsystem as undefined.
mark the bus subsystem as defined.
